Questions Solved

Everything you need to crack CAT

One platform. Complete preparation. AI-powered from day 1 to the final result.

AI Doubt Solver

Get step-by-step solutions with CAT shortcuts for any doubt in seconds.

Adaptive Mocks

Full CAT simulations with real-time percentile prediction and AI analysis.

Percentile Predictor

ML model trained on 5 years of CAT data predicts your exact percentile.

Gamification

XP, badges, streaks and leaderboards keep you motivated every single day.

Video Learning

Premium lectures by top faculty with AI summaries and auto-quizzes.

GD/PI Prep

AI mock interviews, WAT feedback, and MBA SOP builder for final conversions.

Prepare for all MBA Entrance Exams

One platform covering 10+ MBA entrance exams

CAT

Common Admission Test

by IIMs

Duration: 120 minutes
Questions: 66
Colleges: 20 IIMs + 100+ institutes
XAT

Xavier Aptitude Test

by XLRI

Duration: 190 minutes
Questions: 105
Colleges: XLRI + 160+ B-schools
SNAP

Symbiosis National Aptitude Test

by Symbiosis

Duration: 60 minutes
Questions: 60
Colleges: Symbiosis institutes
NMAT

NMIMS Management Aptitude Test

by GMAC

Duration: 120 minutes
Questions: 108
Colleges: NMIMS + other institutes
IIFT

Indian Institute of Foreign Trade

by NTA

Duration: 120 minutes
Questions: 110
Colleges: IIFT Delhi, Kolkata, Kakinada
MICAT

MICA Admission Test

by MICA

Duration: 165 minutes
Questions: 150
Colleges: MICA Ahmedabad
